    Magnetic Lashes That Snap On in Seconds

    Every minute counts that’s why our lashes are designed to save you time and still leave you feeling flawless.

    Beautiful lashes, completely glue-free

      Ocuvana™ Magnetic Lashes

      Ocuvana™ Magnetic Lashes

      ★

      Enhance your look in seconds with our double-strength magnetic lashes, designed for quick application and all- day glamour.


      Regular price $35.00
      Regular price $35.00 Sale price

      View full details

      schema
      REVOLUTIONARY DESIGN

      Our advanced magnetic reconstruction enhances field efficiency, resulting in softer, more stable magnetic strips for effortless application and secure wear.

      eco
      FEATHERLIGHT COMFORT

      Crafted with original polymer materials, the ultra-thin 0.17mm magnetic strips offer unparalleled comfort, making them feel virtually weightless.

      heart_check
      SUPREME SOFTNESS

      Utilizing a patented polymer composite, our lashes provide exceptional flexibility and a natural fit that complements your unique eye shape.

      infrared
      ENHANCED MAGNETIC HOLD

      Employing advanced multi-pole magnetization, our lashes ensure a firm, reliable hold throughout the day, giving you confidence in every blink.

      Your New Go-To Lash Routine

      100%


      No glue, no stress just lashes that are kind to your eyes

      100%

      Ready in minutes because mornings are already busy

      100%

      Stays put all day from first coffee to last call

      Gentle on Your Eyes Kind to Your Lashes

      Say goodbye to glue, irritation, and salon damage.
      Hello, comfort that lasts all day.

      Compatible with your makeup

      Gently lift them away with zero pulling, zero damage because your natural lashes deserve kindness too.

      Removed in Seconds No Tugging, No Tears

      Gently lift them away with zero pulling, zero damage because your natural lashes deserve kindness too.

      FAQ Accordion Section

      Questions? We’ve Got You Covered!

      Will they stay up if it's windy? +

      Windy day? No worries! Our magnetic grip is strong enough to hold through gusts — even from a hairdryer.

      Are they hard to use? +

      There's a small learning curve, but once you’ve got it, it’s a breeze. Every order includes a link to our Mastering Magnetic Lashes tutorial to help you get it just right.

      How does it work? +

      Each eye gets two lash pieces — one on top, one underneath. They click together around your natural lashes for a secure, glue-free hold.

      Will they harm my eyelashes? +

      Not at all. Since there’s no glue involved, magnetic lashes are actually gentler on your natural lashes than most falsies.

      What’s included with my purchase? +

      You’ll get 4 lashes (2 per eye), a mirror case for easy application on the go, and our viral Lash Applicator tool for effortless placement.

      How long do they last? +

      With good care, your lashes can last up to 1–2 years. They’re built to go the distance.

      Are they heavy or light? +

      They’re ultra-light — most users forget they’re even wearing them!

      Can I wear them swimming? +

      They’ll be fine in the rain, but we don’t recommend swimming with them on. Water-resistant? Yes. Swim-proof? Not quite.

      How do I remove these lashes? +

      Just gently peel from the outer or inner corner — they come off in seconds with no tugging or damage. Easy and painless.
